topics.title: AI Announcements
topics.focus: corporate launches, product reveals, partnerships, executive moves, and other big-company AI announcements from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, Microsoft, Amazon, Apple, xAI, etc.

topics.title: Startups
topics.focus: AI startup funding rounds — seed, Series A/B/C, growth rounds, valuations, lead investors, M&A. Always include the round size and stage when known.

topics.title: AI Infrastructure
topics.focus: chips, GPUs, accelerators, datacenters, cloud capacity, training systems, model serving, networking, and AI hardware/software stack news.

topics.title: Deep Tech
topics.focus: scientific discoveries and disruptive research breakthroughs — physics, materials science, biotech, neuroscience, energy, fusion, quantum, robotics, space tech. Favor primary research results over commentary.
